description: Emoji action sequences for the TEE9 Lattice orchestrator. Each sequence maps to a specific system action.

🐛🐟.name: TDS Probe
🐛🐟.desc: Probe domain for Cloudflare fingerprint + redirect chain

🐛🛡🐟.name: HITM Forensic Re-Ingest
🐛🛡🐟.desc: Re-scan blocked domains for mutation tracking

🐟🎞📺.name: Meta Video Render Ingest
🐟🎞📺.desc: Ingest Meta AI share into video pipeline

🐛🔄.name: Reboot Command Hub
🐛🔄.desc: Restart :8787 Light Deck via Kenya Coffee

☕🔍.name: Kenya Coffee Sweep
☕🔍.desc: Health check all 4 ports — boot any that are down

🧱🔐.name: Vault Seal
🧱🔐.desc: Lock treasury + clear browser cookies for affected domains

🐛🍟🍟.name: Belgian Frites Mode
🐛🍟🍟.desc: Fun mode — emoji storytelling pipeline for stream chat

🔣👇🎵.name: System of a Down
🔣👇🎵.desc: Music queue — band emoji decode sequence

🕵♀🏁.name: Detective Sign-Off
🕵♀🏁.desc: End session — archive logs + push telemetry

🎒📺🎞.name: Backpack Drip Stream
🎒📺🎞.desc: ComfyUI 1080 Ti live render pipeline → ambient revenue stream

🧼💩🖥.name: Sanitizer Deck
🧼💩🖥.desc: Scrub fiat contamination — opens quarantine_deck.html from poop-stick-sanitizer root
🧼💩🖥.lore: Direct map to poop-stick-sanitizer. Scrub / Contaminant / Terminal.

🧊🛑🖥.name: Quarantine Hold
🧊🛑🖥.desc: Freeze egress, stop bad payload, open QA Audit Queue UI
🧊🛑🖥.lore: Freeze / Stop / Terminal. The exact function of the QA Audit Queue.

☣️🕷🖥.name: Spy'Dir'E Cell
☣️🕷🖥.desc: Biohazard caught on golden log — open holding cell via Aetheria's thin thread
☣️🕷🖥.lore: Biohazard / Spy'Dir / Terminal. TEE(n) Land Hotel lobby lore — Aetheria's thread caught it.
